18px;"><b>ADD</b>&nbsp; 4(x2), x3</font>" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;fontColor=#333333;strokeColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="565" y="110" width="245" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="oCRrIRJ71gSuBmiPXbuJ-54" value="<span style="font-size: 18px;"><b>LW&nbsp; </b>x4, 4(x2)</span><div><span style="font-size: 18px;"><b>ADD</b>&nbsp; x3, x4, x3</span></div><div><span style="font-size: 18px;"><b>SW&nbsp;</b> x3, 4(x2)</span></div>" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;fontColor=#333333;strokeColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="540" y="360" width="180" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QU4nKm2l2EyM_W4Eh8Ob-1" value="<b style="font-family: &quot;Noto Serif CJK SC&quot;; font-size: 16px; text-wrap-mode: nowrap;">寄存器数量</b>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="205" y="20" width="110" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QU4nKm2l2EyM_W4Eh8Ob-2" value="<b style="font-family: &quot;Noto Serif CJK SC&quot;; font-size: 16px; text-wrap-mode: nowrap;">指令的内存访问模式</b>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="602.5" y="20" width="190" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QU4nKm2l2EyM_W4Eh8Ob-3" value="<span style="font-size: 14px; text-wrap-mode: nowrap;">mem[x2+4] ← mem[x2+4] + x3</span>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="570" y="175" width="240" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QU4nKm2l2EyM_W4Eh8Ob-4" value="<font style="text-wrap-mode: nowrap;" face="Noto Serif CJK SC"><span style="font-size: 14px;">内存访问模式复杂，可以在</span></font><div style="text-wrap-mode: nowrap;"><font face="Noto Serif CJK SC"><span style="font-size: 14px;">一条指令中</span></font><span style="font-size: 14px; font-family: &quot;Noto Serif CJK SC&quot;; background-color: initial;">对内存读和写</span></div>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="570" y="220" width="240" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QU4nKm2l2EyM_W4Eh8Ob-5" value="<font style="text-wrap-mode: nowrap;" face="Noto Serif CJK SC"><span style="font-size: 14px;">内存访问模式简单，只能在一条指令中</span></font><div style="text-wrap-mode: nowrap;"><font face="Noto Serif CJK SC"><span style="font-size: 14px;">对内存进行 load 或 store</span></font></div>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="570" y="470" width="262.5" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QU4nKm2l2EyM_W4Eh8Ob-6" value="<span style="font-family: &quot;Noto Serif CJK SC&quot;; font-size: 14px; text-wrap-mode: nowrap;">寄存器数量较多</span>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="240" y="540" width="130" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QU4nKm2l2EyM_W4Eh8Ob-7" value="<span style="font-family: &quot;Noto Serif CJK SC&quot;; font-size: 14px; text-wrap-mode: nowrap;">寄存器数量较少</span>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="210" y="260" width="130" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QU4nKm2l2EyM_W4Eh8Ob-8" value="<span style="font-family: &quot;Noto Serif CJK SC&quot;; font-size: 14px; text-wrap-mode: nowrap;">复杂指令集</span>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="180" width="95" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QU4nKm2l2EyM_W4Eh8Ob-9" value="<span style="font-family: &quot;Noto Serif CJK SC&quot;; font-size: 14px; text-wrap-mode: nowrap;">精简指令集</span>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="445" width="95" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QU4nKm2l2EyM_W4Eh8Ob-10" value="<font style="text-wrap-mode: nowrap;" face="Noto Serif CJK SC"><span style="font-size: 14px;">x86 16位 cpu 8086</span></font><div style="text-wrap-mode: nowrap;"><font face="Noto Serif CJK SC"><span style="font-size: 14px;">的寄存器</span></font></div>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="352.5" y="130" width="135" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QU4nKm2l2EyM_W4Eh8Ob-11" value="<b style="font-size: 18px; text-wrap-mode: nowrap;">RISC</b>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="32.5" y="400" width="70" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QU4nKm2l2EyM_W4Eh8Ob-12" value="<b style="font-size: 18px; text-wrap-mode: nowrap;">CSIC</b>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="32.5" y="140" width="70" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QU4nKm2l2EyM_W4Eh8Ob-13" value="<font style="text-wrap-mode: nowrap; font-size: 14px;">x4 ← mem[x2+4]</font><div style="text-wrap-mode: nowrap;"><font style="font-size: 14px;">x3 ← x4 + x3&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;&nbsp;<br></font></div><div style="text-wrap-mode: nowrap;"><font style="font-size: 14px;">x3 → mem[x2+4]</font></div>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="720" y="365" width="140" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
